title: Coco 'n' the Fellas Italy Tour
titleBg: Турне в Италия на Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: The band brings their new album 'Some Of Our Favourite Tunes' to Torino, Chivasso, and Bologna.
descriptionEn: The band brings their new album 'Some Of Our Favourite Tunes' to Torino, Chivasso, and Bologna.
descriptionBg: Групата представя новия си албум „Some Of Our Favourite Tunes“ в Торино, Кивасо и Болоня.
body:
After touring between Scotland and Bulgaria, Coco 'n' the Fellas are coming to Italy with their new album "Some Of Our Favourite Tunes ".

Dopo i Tour in Scozia e Bulgaria, Coco 'n' the Fellas torna in Italia  per presentare l'ultimo disco " Some of Our Favourite Tunes" .
Ecco tutte le date:

14 Luglio - Jazz Club Torino /  h 21:30
http://www.jazzclub.torino.it/event/coco-n-the-fellas/
15 Luglio - Estival - Chivasso / h 19:00
https://www.facebook.com/events/243718436110147/
16 Luglio - Passaggio in Collina - Piazzo (TO) / h 19:30
https://www.facebook.com/events/1940005266256072/
17 Luglio - Video Shoot Off The Corner
https://www.facebook.com/OffTheCornerSessions/
19 Luglio - Il Salotto del Jazz - Cantine Bentivoglio (BO) / h 21:30
http://www.cantinabentivoglio.it/ita/salotto_del_jazz.html

https://www.coconthefellas.com/on-tour
bodyEn:
After touring between Scotland and Bulgaria, Coco 'n' the Fellas are coming to Italy with their new album "Some Of Our Favourite Tunes ".

Tour Dates:
- July 14th: Jazz Club Torino
- July 15th: Estival, Chivasso
- July 16th: Passaggio in Collina, Piazzo (TO)
- July 17th: Video Shoot Off The Corner
- July 19th: Il Salotto del Jazz - Cantine Bentivoglio, Bologna
bodyBg:
След турнета в Шотландия и България, Coco 'n' the Fellas идват в Италия с новия си албум „Some Of Our Favourite Tunes“.

Дати на турнето:
- 14 юли: Jazz Club Torino
- 15 юли: Estival, Chivasso
- 16 юли: Passaggio in Collina, Piazzo (TO)
- 17 юли: Снимане на видео Off The Corner
- 19 юли: Il Salotto del Jazz - Cantine Bentivoglio, Bologna
